title: Calm bedtime story
summary: A short calming story before sleep.

title: Calm story — full version
steps: The hero sees a light near the window.
The light leads through soft clouds.

title: Brave adventure — full version

title: Friendship story
summary: A little animal finds a friend.

dontDo: do not make being lost scary

title: Funny robot
summary: A robot misunderstands and learns to ask.

title: Dragon and castle
steps: The dragon lives near a castle.
warnings: The dragon should not be scary.

title: Dragon and castle — full version
summary: A story about not judging by looks.
steps: The dragon lives by the castle.
People fear it because they do not know it.
The dragon becomes a castle friend.
